summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt football prediction app clone. All backend APIs working correctly, all frontend pages accessible with proper functionality.
passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/api/health) returns healthy status
Backend root API (/api/) returns correct message
System metrics endpoint shows MongoDB and Redis connected
Football matches endpoint returns real match data with team names
Homepage loads with GUESSIT branding and hero banner
Navigation to all required pages working (Login, Register, Leaderboard, About, Contact, How It Works, News)
Match cards display with team names and prediction buttons
Login page accessible with email/password form and Google OAuth
Register page accessible with registration form
Leaderboard page shows ranking visualization with Weekly/Global tabs
About page contains comprehensive content about the platform
Contact page has contact form elements
How It Works page explains 6-step prediction process
News page accessible with loading indicator
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (4/4 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all pages accessible and functional)
